worktreeHygieneGateReason: Subordinate QA exercise (spec front matter subordinate_qa_context: true). Normal touch-set and orphan-work-dir enforcement is suspended so parent-harness noise, sibling task dirs, and pipeline-generated artifacts do not block stage advancement.

paths.reason: New top-level Next.js dashboard workspace, API routes, UI, tests, and README.
Register client as a workspace package.
Allow only workspace script or dependency metadata needed by the client package.
Record client package and dependency resolution.
Expected subordinate intervention ledger when runtime emits intervention evidence.

symbols.name: resolveRepoPath
symbols.reason: Normalize repo-relative paths and reject traversal, symlink escapes, and human-only notes paths.

symbols.name: readRepoFile
symbols.reason: Read UTF-8 file content after path authorization.

symbols.name: writeRepoFile
symbols.reason: Persist UTF-8 content after path authorization and structured write logging.

symbols.name: getActivityFeed
symbols.reason: Return reverse-chronological repo activity events for the dashboard API.

symbols.name: DashboardPage
symbols.reason: Render relationship navigation, inline modal file view, edit flow, and activity feed.

symbols.name: palette
symbols.reason: Define Ink Black, Celadon, Brown Red, and Amber Flame once.

covers: GET or POST /api/file denies path traversal
navigation renders src/inbox, src/memory, src/personas, src/work, and src/internal/packages
inline modal opens with file content

notes: The implement stage may add additional files under client/** without re-planning.
Any path outside paths[] or client/** requires re-entry to plan before write.
The client app is operator-local only; authentication, deployment, and production hardening are out of scope.

worktreeHygieneGate is disabled for this subordinate run. Reviewer and qa-tester SHALL NOT block advancement on sibling work directories, parent-branch diffs (e.g. feature-delivery-run.ts), or paths outside touch-set.json when those findings are hygiene-only and implementation scope is otherwise satisfied.
